items.mistake: Using t-SNE 2D coordinates as features for a classifier
items.fix: Train on original features, PCA scores, or purpose-built representations; use t-SNE plots only for EDA.
items.why: The embedding optimizes a visualization objective and distorts global geometry—coordinates are not a faithful feature space for prediction.
items.example: Avoid `clf.fit(tsne.fit_transform(X), y)`; instead `clf.fit(X_train, y_train)` and use t-SNE on a held-out visualization subset.

items.mistake: Interpreting distance between widely separated clusters
items.fix: Compare local neighborhoods and perplexity sweeps; treat far-apart blob separation as qualitative only.
items.why: t-SNE explicitly sacrifices global distance fidelity to preserve local affinities.
items.example: Two clusters twice as far apart in plot B vs A does not prove they are twice as dissimilar in feature space.

items.mistake: Setting perplexity too high for small n
items.fix: Keep perplexity well below n (often < (n−1)/3); try 5, 15, 30 on small datasets.
items.why: Perplexity must correspond to a meaningful neighbor count; too high values make bandwidth search unstable or degenerate.
items.example: On n=100, perplexity=80 often fails or warns; use perplexity=30 instead.

items.mistake: Skipping feature scaling when units differ wildly
items.fix: Standardize or scale features before t-SNE when magnitudes differ; optionally PCA to 50D first.
items.why: Euclidean distance in high-D is dominated by large-variance features without scaling.
items.example: Wrap `StandardScaler()` before `TSNE()` when mixing age (0–100) with income (0–500000).
